[[ja:印岐志呂神社]] {{Expand Japanese|印岐志呂神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikishiro Shrine | native_name = 印岐志呂神社 | image = Ikisiro jinja honden.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikishiro Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.05649|135.951329}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ikishiro Shrine'''|印岐志呂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 13 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039794|ltq=Q135039794|qid=Q135039794|1=Takanono Shrine (Q135039794)}} ** P156: {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|lt=Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社|qid=Q11382603|1=Sakunado Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q386677|ltq=Q386677|qid=Q386677|1=Kusatsu, Shiga}} * {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Kurita District, Shiga|lt=Kurita district|en|Kurita District, Shiga|ja|栗太郡|zh|栗太郡|qid=Q6446084|1=Kurita District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.05649|135.951329}} == image (P18) == * Ikisiro jinja honden.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181793 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == VIAF cluster ID (P214) == * 259687189 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6160005008083 == NDL Authority ID (P349) == * 00759682 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県草津市片岡町245', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:印岐志呂神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11409089}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name=Ikishiro Shrine | Image=[[File:Ikisiro jinja honden.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall | Location={{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kusatsu City|Q386677|qid=Q386677|1=Kusatsu, Shiga}} Kataoka-chō 245 | Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deity={{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} | Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (Minor)
Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} | Founded=During the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|qid=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}} | Annual festival={{ill|lt=May 3|Q2547|qid=Q2547|1=May 3}} | Rituals= | Map= {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ikishiro
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ikishiro Shrine''' (いきしろじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Kataoka-chō, {{ill|lt=Kusatsu City|Q386677|qid=Q386677|1=Kusatsu, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined Deities === * {{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} === History === It is said to have been founded during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenji|Q314802|qid=Q314802|1=Emperor Tenji}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} listed in the Jinmyōchō of the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}. According to shrine tradition, it received the divine rank of Senior Sixth Rank in the first year of {{ill|lt=Ninju|Q1373077|qid=Q1373077|1=Ninju}}. During the {{ill|lt=Kenmu Disturbance|Q11486475|qid=Q11486475|1=Kenmu Disturbance}}, in the 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Kenmu (Japan)|Q1193970|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}}, it became a battlefield during clashes between {{ill|lt=Ogasawara Sadamune|Q7079835|qid=Q7079835|1=Ogasawara Sadamune}} of the Ashikaga faction and the forces of Mount Hiei and {{ill|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|Q1328796|qid=Q1328796|1=Nitta Yoshisada}} of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kenmu government|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Battles in Ōmi|Q65284013|qid=Q65284013|1=Battle of Omi}}). It was also the site of battles during {{ill|lt=Oda Nobunaga|Q171411|qid=Q171411|1=Oda Nobunaga}}’s campaigns against the {{ill|lt=Rokkaku clan|Q2975342|qid=Q2975342|1=Rokkaku clan}}, among other conflicts, and was repeatedly exposed to warfare. In the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}}, it was designated a village shrine, and in the 6th year of {{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}}, it was elevated to a prefectural shrine. === Shrine Crest === Left-facing triple tomoe === Festivals === * Annual festival: May 3 === Subsidiary Shrines === * Ninomiya Shrine * Sannomiya Shrine * Juge Shrine * Wakamiya Shrine * Inari Shrine * Ebisu Shrine * Okumimae Shrine === Cultural Properties === * Broad-tipped bronze spear = == See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shinto|Q812767|qid=Q812767|1=Shinto}} * {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} === References === {{Reflist}} === External Links === * {{facebook|igushiro}} {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Authority control}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikishiro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikishiro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikishiro Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:草津市の歴史]] [[Category:草津市の建築物]]
